name: Search
copyPolicy: Use English labels as working copy/placeholders unless Arabic copy is provided. Preserve space for Arabic translation.

canonicalReference.editPolicy: Treat as canonical reference. Create a duplicate or new mockup frame unless the user explicitly asks to edit this component.

productPurpose: Core S-System app for finding and reviewing records, documents, images, events, and related evidence across configured data sources.
domainNotes: Records are the main things users can find in Search.
A record can be linked or attached to a task.
A record can be linked to an entity.
Entities are special text items used in documents; this definition should be refined when more domain details are provided.
commonUserWork: Start a quick, advanced, or image search.
Choose data sources and search modes.
Select a result and review its preview/detail.
Request access for blocked results when the screen state calls for it.

topBar.purpose: Global Search scope, mode navigation, history, saved-search entry points, and app-level actions.

queryIsland.purpose: Query text, search mode controls, and immediate query actions.

resultsList.purpose: Returned records, documents, images, events, or related results.

filters.purpose: Persistent search filters, data source refinements, and saved-search related filtering.

previewDetail.purpose: Selected result preview/detail, or an instructional empty state when nothing is selected.

drawingRules: Read this JSON and app/apps/search.md before drawing Search features.
Use app/screens/search/canonical-layout.md as the layout blueprint.
Put query text and immediate query mode controls in the Search Query Island.
Put persistent filters in the filters panel.
Put selected-result content in the preview/detail island.
Keep RTL alignment and preserve Arabic expansion space.
Keep 8px island gaps and canonical panel widths unless explicitly redesigning the layout.

Use published SUI components from the local component index by componentKey. If a Search-specific component is not indexed locally, inspect the Search canonical file before drawing and call out the gap.
Create a duplicate or new mockup frame rather than modifying the canonical reference.
openQuestions: Exact tab labels and default active Search mode.
Exact row component mapping for non-document result types.
Which filters are always visible versus hidden behind additional controls.
Detailed copy for no-results, blocked-result, and request-access states.
